schema.description: The complete ATPL exam preparation platform with 20,000+ questions, research-based explanations, aviation dictionary, live quizzes, and study tools.
schema.offerFreeDescription: Discover the platform with no commitment
schema.offerStandardDescription: Complete question bank, unlimited STUDY quizzes, aviation dictionary, library access
schema.offerPremiumDescription: All quiz modes, live quizzes, study assistant, advanced stats, unlimited bookmarks
schema.featureDictionary: Aviation dictionary with audio and 3D models

faq.a1: MyATPS is a complete online platform designed to help student pilots prepare for their ATPL exams. It combines an advanced quiz interface with 20,000+ questions, research-based explanations, an aviation dictionary with audio and 3D models, a resource library, live quiz sharing, and powerful progress tracking.
faq.a2: Our explanations are crafted from extensive research in aviation education and teaching methodology. Each explanation is structured to help you truly understand the concept, not just memorize the answer.
faq.q3: What is the difference between Standard and Premium?
faq.a3: Standard gives you the complete question bank, unlimited STUDY quizzes, 5 TEST quizzes per day, the aviation dictionary, the library, and basic stats. Premium unlocks everything: unlimited TEST and EXAM quizzes, live quiz sharing, the study assistant, advanced stats, unlimited bookmarks, and priority support.
faq.q4: Can I study with friends or share quizzes?
faq.a4: Yes! MyATPS lets you share study sessions and launch live Kahoot-style quizzes where participants join with a simple code — no account needed.
faq.q5: Is there a free trial available?
faq.a5: Yes! The Premium plan includes a 48-hour free trial so you can explore all features before committing. You can also start with the Free plan.

footer.description: The complete ATPL exam preparation platform, built by pilots for pilots. Pass your exams on the first try with research-based content and a modern study experience.

hero.titleFull: Pass Your ATPL on the First Try
hero.description: 20,000+ questions with research-based explanations, an aviation dictionary with audio & 3D models, live quizzes, and a complete study ecosystem — the only ATPL platform that gives you everything in one place.
hero.subtitle: 20,000+ questions, research-based explanations, aviation dictionary with 3D models, live quizzes, and a complete study ecosystem.
hero.trustLine: Trusted by student pilots across Europe
hero.chatUser1: I'm struggling with ILS approach questions — can you help me understand the key concepts?
hero.chatAi1: Absolutely! Our research-backed explanations break it down clearly: the localizer provides lateral guidance, while the glide slope handles vertical guidance — both using radio beams to guide you to the runway threshold.
hero.chatUser2: Great, let me start a quiz on Radio Navigation!
